rationale.R1.6: The writing is significantly improved with clearer sentences and a more concise style.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty regarding the numerical claims (win rates, effect size) which are placeholders.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the requested active set of dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide provenance or traceability for the changes made.
